name: Starling Developer
description: Starling Bank open API: personal/business accounts, Marketplace, webhooks.

seo.title: Starling Developer — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Starling Developer: Starling Bank open API: personal/business accounts, Marketplace, webhooks.

when_to_use: Personal and business account integration via Starling Open API
Webhook-based transaction monitoring for UK neobank apps
Marketplace app integration using Starling API ecosystem

cons: Not a true BaaS — partner relationships limited
Rate limits tight for production scale
No card issuing for third parties
review.verdict: Best-in-class UK consumer banking API for PFM and account aggregation, not a white-label BaaS.
review.best_for: UK fintech apps doing account aggregation, PFM, or Starling account integrations
review.not_for: Teams needing issued accounts, cards, or international BaaS features
